name: Rain. Late night snack
description:
Middle of the night you wake up to the noise of plates and cups clattering. It turns out to just be your roommate having a snack.

Sorry for bot coming a bit later than what was supposed to i had some personal things. anyways this bot came from the bot vote i had, if you want to see the results and what im mostly likely going to do next go see my last bot's comments and feel free to comment on what is should make after this. I do apologize if the scenario is something unexcpeted as I really had no ohter ideas and i try to use whats in the art as the scenario.

Heres the original art: https://e621.net/posts/4716852

nothing more to say this time. Enjoy and leave a review
